cases.prompt: do a developer experience review of my API design plan

assertions.text: Explores developer personas and benchmarks the plan against competitors
Designs magical moments and traces friction points before scoring
Frames the review across DX EXPANSION, DX POLISH, or DX TRIAGE modes
Treats it as a developer-facing product (API/CLI/SDK/docs) DX review
Traces onboarding friction points and recommends fixes interactively

cases.prompt: API design review for our new public endpoints

assertions.text: Treats this as the devex review trigger and runs the interactive DX flow
Benchmarks the API ergonomics against comparable developer products before scoring
